items.title: New Polygon tool
items.text: Click to drop points connected by straight lines (no dragging) and close the shape by clicking the first point, double-clicking or pressing Enter. Backspace removes the last point, Esc cancels. Perfect for irregular SFX shapes.

items.title: Updates tab: automatic or manual, pick any version
items.text: New Settings → Updates tab. Choose Automatic (install on next start) or Manual (an Update button appears with the new version). You can also install a specific version to roll back, and your current version is shown at the bottom.

items.title: Seamless updates on next start
items.text: Updates install themselves the next time you open BubblR Trainer — during the splash it swaps in the new build and relaunches once, with no dialog and no restart prompt (Krita-style).

items.title: Background images & custom classes
items.text: Export empty pages as YOLO negatives, define your own detection classes, and export classes.txt + data.yaml with an optional train/val split — train any object detector, not just manga bubbles.
